title: C-8 protocol droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''C-8 [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]]''' was a household [[Droid/Legends|droid]] programmed with many functions and forms of communication. It was manufactured by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] on the [[Factory world/Legends|factory moon]] of [[Telti/Legends|Telti]]. It was the predecessor of the [[C-9 protocol droid]] and the successor of the [[C-7 protocol droid]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]''
